note: V2 acceptance floor for Phase 14 FT-012 (FIDL-03). Committed summary counts — NOT the full graph_data.json dumps (those remain gitignored). Missing this file is a HARD FAILURE in FT-012 (a skippable gate is no gate). Drug-discovery floors are seeded from pre-Phase-14 runs (2026-04-13 output-v2/ artifacts); they serve as a no-regression gate — post-chonkie extraction must meet or exceed these counts. The contract scenario carries the D-14 floor (>=341 nodes / >=663 edges). Human checkpoint (Plan 14-04 Task 3) resolved 2026-04-20 via Option 3a: adopt pre-Phase-14 counts as floors without running fresh post-Phase-14 extraction, on the rationale that FT-012 is a guardrail against future code changes, not an acceptance test for Phase 14 itself (which is proven by UT-031..UT-038 + UT-033b + UT-036b at unit level and FT-011 at E2E level).
